title: Method of providing interaction in wearable device with a curved periphery
abstract: A method of user interaction in a wearable device with a curved periphery is provided. The method includes displaying a blob when an item is displayed on the screen of the wearable device, obtaining a first input on the curved periphery associated with the blob, obtaining a second input along the curved periphery in conjunction with the first input, and performing an action in the item displayed on the screen of the wearable device.
claims: Claims ( 15 ) A wearable device for providing a user interaction, the wearable device comprising: a display; and a processor configured to: control the display to display a visual element when an item is displayed on the display of the wearable device, wherein the visual element is displayed near the periphery of the wearable device and the periphery of the wearable device is disposed near the display, receive a first input on a part of the periphery of the wearable device, in response to receiving the first input, perform a first action associated with the item, receive a second input on another part of the periphery, and in response to receiving the second input, perform a second action associated with the item. The wearable device of claim 1, wherein the processor is further configured to: in response to receiving the first input, change the feature of the item by a first unit, and in response to receiving the second input, change the feature of the item by a second unit, wherein the first unit is larger than the second unit. The wearable device of claim 1, the wearable device further comprises an interaction unit, wherein the interaction unit comprises at least one touch sensor disposed on the periphery of the wearable device. The wearable device of claim 1, the wearable device further comprises an interaction unit, wherein the interaction unit is disposed on near of an edge of the display. The wearable device of claim 1, wherein the processor is further configured to cause to vary at least one feature of the item displayed on the display of the wearable device in accordance with the second input. The wearable device of claim 1, wherein the processor is further configured to cause to render a portion of the item displayed on the display of the wearable device in accordance with the second input. The wearable device of claim 1, wherein the processor is further configured to cause to change the item displayed on the display of the wearable device in accordance with the second input. The wearable device of claim 1, wherein the visual element is displayed at a pre-determined region on the display of the wearable device. The wearable device of claim 8, wherein the pre-determined region is configurable based on a user preference. The wearable device of claim 1, wherein each of a plurality of visual elements is displayed at a respective pre-determined region on the display of the wearable device. The wearable device of claim 10, wherein the processor is further configured to display a plurality of items on the display, wherein each item from the plurality of items is selected in accordance with the first input on the periphery of the wearable device. The wearable device of claim 11, wherein the at least one feature of the selected item varies in accordance with the second input along the periphery of the wearable device in conjunction with the first input. A method of providing a user interaction, the method comprising: displaying a visual element when an item is displayed on a screen of the wearable device, wherein the visual element is displayed on near a periphery of the wearable device, the periphery of the wearable device being disposed near the display; receiving a first input on a part of the periphery of the wearable device; in response to receiving the first input, performing a first action associated with the item; receiving a second input on another part of the periphery; and in response to receiving the second input, performing a second action associated with the item. the method of Claim 13, wherein the method further comprises: in response to receiving the first input, changing the feature of the item by a first unit, and in response to receiving the second input, changing the feature of the item by a second unit, wherein the first unit is larger than the second unit. The method of claim 13, wherein the performing of the second action comprises: causing to vary at least one feature of the item displayed on the screen of the wearable device in accordance with the second input.
